sectionHeadings: 010 — Dual-app generator: two independent Encore apps
FR-007 — Per-variant `git init` skipped for machine-driven runs
record.summary: setup-dual-app.ts generates two independent Encore applications from one invocation: <dest>/public (AUTH_DRIVER=saml, external-facing, apps/web) and <dest>/internal (AUTH_DRIVER=entra-id, staff-facing, apps/web-internal wired into the internal app's web service). Independent apps — separate encore.app files, databases, and deployments — are the locked isolation decision.
record.title: Dual-app generator: two independent Encore apps (external SAML + staff Entra)
